steps.title: Connect comments to avoidance
steps.content: The text says Mrs. Ochiltree made frank, sometimes startling comments about her acquaintances and that this characteristic caused her to be avoided.

steps.title: Infer the acquaintances' reaction
steps.content: If people avoid her because of blunt remarks about them, they are likely offended by those remarks. A reverses the concern, B conflicts with her delight in being avoided, and C invents an unrelated reason for not speaking with her. The answer is D.
